title: Cummins: Sustainable Hydrogen Energy
text: Cummins' recent announcement of a major green hydrogen alliance positions the company as a leader in delivering full-circle sustainable hydrogen energy. Demand for the company's electrolyzer and fuel cell solutions should rise as the renewable revolution gathers momentum and demand for fossil fuels ebbs.

title: 7 Cheap Retirement Stocks to Buy Now
text: While the thought of being an AARP cardmember may be far away, it's never too early to start thinking about cheap retirement stocks to buy. True, timing the market carries risks.

title: Rose Review: Keep Cummins, Sell 3M And Watch Deere
text: A review of why I sold 3M, kept Cummins and now watch Deere & Co as a replacement within the industrial sector. They all offer quality and safe dividends which are reviewed for earnings, P/E, yield and price value from Value Line, Morningstar and Yahoo Finance.

title: Cummins to Supply 35MW Electrolyzer System to Linde for Green Hydrogen Production in Niagara Falls, New York
text: COLUMBUS, Ind.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Cummins Inc. (NYSE: CMI) will supply a 35-megawatt (MW) proton exchange membrane (PEM) electrolyzer system for Linde's new hydrogen production plant in Niagara Falls, New York. Once commissioned, Cummins' electrolyzer system will power Linde's largest green hydrogen plant in the U.S., marking significant progress in moving the green hydrogen economy forward.

title: Cummins (CMI) Acquires Siemens Commercial Vehicles Business
text: Cummins (CMI) completes the acquisition of Siemens Commercial Vehicles business. The transaction has been made through CMI's subsidiary, Meritor.
